title: Amtech - Cleaning Brush for Alloy Wheels with Loop Design for Easy Access Between Spokes, Home DIY, Lightweight, Easy to Use, Non-Scratching Bristles for Smooth Finish
features: NON-MARKING: This alloy car wheel cleaning brush has non-scratching bristles and a loop design for effective cleaning in hard to reach areas
LIGHTWEIGHT: With a lightweight body it is ideal for cleaning dust and dirt from alloy wheels
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description The brush features a loop design to clean hard to reach areas. The non-scratching bristles don’t damage or mark the surface. Ideal for cleaning dust and dirt from alloy wheels.

specifications_table.Included Components: Amtech S6312 Alloy Wheel Cleaning Brush
